productDisplayName: W Women Floral Print Off White Kurta
description: Composition Off white kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with pin tucks, with a small mandarin collar and a slit neckline, has half buttoned placket, stitch detailing on the chest and back, floral print and a vented curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this classic piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8", chest 33" and waist 26"
